selected_pddl:
(define (problem blocksworld-invert-towers)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    (arm-empty)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    (on-table b2)
    (clear b2)
    (on-table b3)
    (on b4 b3)
    (on b5 b4)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (clear b7)
    (on-table b8)
    (on b9 b8)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      (on-table b2)
      (clear b2)
      (on-table b3)
      (on b4 b3)
      (on b5 b4)
      (on b6 b5)
      (on b7 b6)
      (clear b7)
      (on-table b8)
      (on b9 b8)
      (on b10 b9)
      (on b11 b10)
      (on b12 b11)
      (on b13 b12)
      (on b14 b13)
      (on b15 b14)
      (on b16 b15)
      (on b17 b16)
      (on b18 b17)
      (on b19 b18)
      (on b20 b19)
      (clear b20)
    )
  )
)

natural_language:
You have 1 rooms.
You have 3 balls.
You have 6 grippers.
Gripper gripper1 is carrying ball1.
Gripper gripper2 is carrying ball2.
gripper3 is free.
gripper4 is free.
gripper5 is free.
gripper6 is free.
ball3 is at room1.
Your goal is to have the following:
Gripper gripper1 should be carrying ball2.
Gripper gripper2 should be carrying ball1.
gripper3 should be free.
gripper4 should be free.
gripper5 should be free.
gripper6 should be free.
ball3 should be at room1.
selected_pddl:
(define (problem gripper-juggle)
  (:domain gripper)
  (:requirements :strips :typing)
  (:objects
    rooma - room
    ball1 ball2 ball3 - ball
    gripper1 gripper2 gripper3 gripper4 gripper5 gripper6 - gripper
  )
  (:init
    (room rooma)
    (at-robby rooma)
    (at ball3 rooma)
    (carry ball1 gripper1)
    (carry ball2 gripper2)
    (free gripper3)
    (free gripper4)
    (free gripper5)
    (free gripper6)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (carry ball1 gripper2)
      (carry ball2 gripper1)
      (at ball3 rooma)
    )
  )
)
